fileSummary.generationHeader: This file is a merged representation of the entire codebase, combined into a single document by Repomix.
fileSummary.purpose:
This file contains a packed representation of the entire repository's contents.
It is designed to be easily consumable by AI systems for analysis, code review,
or other automated processes.
fileSummary.fileFormat:
The content is organized as follows:
1. This summary section
2. Repository information
3. Directory structure
4. Repository files, each consisting of:
   - File path as a key
   - Full contents of the file as the value
fileSummary.usageGuidelines:
- This file should be treated as read-only. Any changes should be made to the
  original repository files, not this packed version.
- When processing this file, use the file path to distinguish
  between different files in the repository.
- Be aware that this file may contain sensitive information. Handle it with
  the same level of security as you would the original repository.
fileSummary.notes:
- Some files may have been excluded based on .gitignore rules and Repomix's configuration
- Binary files are not included in this packed representation. Please refer to the Repository Structure section for a complete list of file paths, including binary files
- Files matching patterns in .gitignore are excluded
- Files matching default ignore patterns are excluded
- Files are sorted by Git change count (files with more changes are at the bottom)

Allow: /images/

files.public/sitemap.xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<urlset xmlns="http://www.sitemaps.org/schemas/sitemap/0.9"
        xmlns:image="http://www.google.com/schemas/sitemap-image/1.1">

  <!-- Homepage -->
  <url>
    <loc>https://devil-s-cafe.vercel.app/</loc>
    <lastmod>2026-03-13</lastmod>
    <changefreq>weekly</changefreq>
    <priority>1.0</priority>

    <!-- Image sitemaps — tells Google about your food photos -->
    <image:image>
      <image:loc>https://devil-s-cafe.vercel.app/images/hero_burger.jpg</image:loc>
      <image:title>Devil's Den Cafe — Peri Peri Burger, Motera Ahmedabad</image:title>
    </image:image>

    <image:image>
      <image:loc>https://devil-s-cafe.vercel.app/images/four_cheese_pizza.jpg</image:loc>
      <image:title>4 Cheese Pizza — Devil's Den Cafe, Motera</image:title>
    </image:image>

    <image:image>
      <image:loc>https://devil-s-cafe.vercel.app/images/mexican_sandwich.jpg</image:loc>
      <image:title>3-Tier Mexican Sandwich — Devil's Den Cafe</image:title>
    </image:image>
  </url>
</urlset>

import { createRoot } from 'react-dom/client'
import './styles/index.css'
import App from './App.jsx'

createRoot(document.getElementById('root')).render(
  <StrictMode>
    <App />
  </StrictMode>,
)
files.README.md:
# 👹 Devil's Den Cafe — The Den Never Sleeps

A premium, production-ready **Digital Hub** for Devil's Den Cafe, Motera. This isn't just a restaurant website; it's a high-performance, cyberpunk-infused digital identity designed to dominate the late-night economy of North Ahmedabad.

---

## ⚡ Core Philosophy
Devil's Den Cafe is built on a **Cyberpunk-Noir** aesthetic—dark, moody, and intense. It is engineered for speed, premium user experience, and absolute search engine dominance.

## 🛠️ Tech Stack
- **Frontend Framework**: [React 19](https://react.dev/) + [Vite](https://vitejs.dev/)
- **Styling**: [Tailwind CSS v4](https://tailwindcss.com/) (The next generation of CSS utility-first architecture)
- **Animations**: [GSAP](https://gsap.com/) (ScrollTrigger, staggered entry, and glassmorphism motion)
- **Status Engine**: Custom React Hook for real-time "Open/Closed" logic (Handles 2 AM midnight crossover)
- **SEO**: JSON-LD Structured Data (SEOSchema), fully optimized Meta Tags, and dynamic Sitemaps.

---

## 🔥 Key Features

### 1. The Signature Lab
A minimalist, high-end menu system featuring over 75+ real items, categorized for speed and readability. Designed with a dotted-leader layout to evoke an artisanal, premium feel.

### 2. High-Performance SEO
- **Rich Snippets**: Integrated JSON-LD for Google Knowledge Panels and Rich Search Results.
- **Local SEO**: Geotagging and specific location optimization for Motera, Ahmedabad.
- **Performance**: High `fetchpriority` on hero assets, preconnected fonts, and lazy loading for scroll-depth performance.

### 3. Dynamic Status
A real-time logic engine that reflects the Cafe's late-night status (Open 9:00 AM – 2:00 AM), ensuring customers always know when the "Devil" is awake.

### 4. Interactive UX
- **Glassmorphism**: Modern, blurred UI elements for a sleek, industrial look.
- **Scroll-Triggered Motion**: Cinematic staggered entry for all major sections via GSAP.
- **WhatsApp Integration**: Direct, one-click ordering and inquiry channel.

---

## 🚀 Getting Started

1. **Clone the repository**:
   ```bash
   git clone [your-repo-link]
   ```

2. **Install dependencies**:
   ```bash
   cd client
   npm install --legacy-peer-deps
   ```

3. **Run the Development Server**:
   ```bash
   npm run dev
   ```

4. **Build for Production**:
   ```bash
   npm run build
   ```

---

## 📍 Location
**Devil's Den Cafe**
GF 8A, Sangath Central Mall,
Behind 4D Mall, Motera,
Ahmedabad, Gujarat 380005.

---

## 👨‍💻 Development Notes
This project was developed with a "Zero Backend" philosophy for the first phase, prioritizing speed, free deployment (Vercel/Netlify), and WhatsApp-driven customer interaction.

---
© 2026 Devil's Den Cafe. Built for the late-night denizens of Motera.
